company.name: Dhaka Logistics Services & Solution
company.description: DLSS is your strategic partner for HR outsourcing, logistics management, and comprehensive support services — freeing your managerial bandwidth to focus on growth.

registered.label: Registered Office
registered.address: 24/A, Skylark Point (4th Floor), Bijoy Nagar, Dhaka – 1000

corporate.label: Corporate Office
corporate.address: H # 101 B (South), R # 07, New DOHS, Mohakhali, Dhaka – 1206

vision: We will be the one single point of contact to buy in all routine as well as sudden support & services and related tasks to free Managerial time of an Organization to boost up the Organizational efficiency through proper utilization of strategic planning method and decision-making capabilities.
mission: Ease in all day-to-day problems through support, service and related routine jobs of an Organization.
Free Managerial time so that the Manager is able to fully focus on business growth via determining strategies, planning & execution.
Support the Organization to boost up the organizational efficiency.

capabilities.title: Multinational Experience
capabilities.description: Strong understanding of Code of Conduct, Compliant culture based on Labour laws/rules, Corporate Citizenship, and Industrial Relations.

capabilities.title: Government Liaison
capabilities.description: Strong liaison and relationship with law enforcing agencies, government and non-government bodies to ease jobs timely and efficiently.

capabilities.title: Engineering Strength
capabilities.description: Graduate Engineers from top institutes including BUET handling construction, design, and engineering projects.

capabilities.title: Financial Solvent
capabilities.description: Financially solvent without primary dependency on financial institutions. Management averages 15 years experience, max 35 years.

services.title: Human Resource Outsourcing
services.description: Recruitment, selection, training orientation, service book preparation, and complete HR operations management.

services.title: HR / IR Consultancy & Audit
services.description: Industrial relations consulting, CBA negotiation support, and compliance audit services for multinational and local companies.

services.title: Payroll Management
services.description: Complete payroll processing including Provident Fund and Gratuity management, ensuring accurate and timely disbursement.

services.title: Logistics Services & Solutions
services.description: Vehicle management, ETMS & telematics support, database monitoring, and logistic support services nationwide.

services.title: Event Management
services.description: Corporate event planning and activation services in partnership with SalMark, delivering high-ROI experiences.

services.title: Business Operations Outsourcing
services.description: Target-oriented sales support, call center management, communication & monitoring, and legal support services.

services.title: Canteen & Catering Services
services.description: Full-spectrum catering and F&B management, cleaning & janitorial services for corporate facilities.

services.title: Engineering & Construction
services.description: Design, erection, government permission services, and civil works handled by BUET-graduate engineers.

clients.name: Government of the People's Republic of Bangladesh

partners.name: SalMark
partners.description: Inspired by renowned corporate leaders, SalMark focuses on reducing costs, increasing efficiency, and achieving better ROI through innovative event solutions.

partners.name: Monower Associates
partners.description: Expert HR and management consultancy partner providing strategic advisory for complex organizational challenges.

partners.name: 3D Tracking
partners.description: Global telematics service platform provider, founded in Guernsey in 2005, with UK-based servers. Powers all vehicle tracking and safety system services.

partners.name: GreenRoad
partners.description: Founded in 2004, GreenRoad provides fleet management solutions focused on improving driver behavior through in-cab real-time coaching and driver engagement.

future.title: Integrated Facility Management (IFM)
future.description: DLSS is expanding into full IFM — covering General Cleaning, Utility Services, Construction & Civil Works, Warehouse Management, and Servicing & Maintenance under one umbrella.
